theme: sailing fleet racing through gates in churned water
title: Regatta Wake Fanout
strategies: single shared racing line, unsorted gate order, tick-0 launch (naive baseline, ~0.1)
per-boat shortest path to a fixed mark, still tick-0 launch for the whole fleet -- efficient alone, but the fleet still fully converges onto one lane (trap)

mean-field reformulation: schedule boats one at a time, replaying the shared wake field to pick each boat's own (lane, departure-tick) pair against the fleet already committed -- exploits lane spreading where the band has room and phase staggering beyond the decay window where a lane must be shared
